name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America Logansport, Indiana — Advance America is a national payday and installment lender offering $100–$1,000 loans in-store or online, plus ti...
description_long:
Advance America is one of the largest and most recognizable short-term consumer lenders in the United States, operating hundreds of physical locations nationwide alongside a full online lending platform. The Jacksonville location at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave. serves the Commonwealth Village neighborhood and surrounding communities west of downtown, positioned between I-95 and I-295 just north of I-10. The company describes itself as nationally recognized and fully accredited, with over 200,000 Google reviews and a 4.9-star aggregate rating across more than 125,000 verified customer reviews.

Advance America offers three core loan products at this location. Payday Loans range from $100 to $500 and are designed as two-to-four-week bridge loans meant to cover cash shortfalls between paychecks. Installment Loans range from $100 to $1,000 and allow repayment across multiple scheduled payments rather than a lump sum, making them marginally more manageable than payday loans. Title Loans are available up to $25,000 and are offered in partnership with LoanCenter, using the borrower's paid-off vehicle as collateral. The store also provides Western Union money transfer services. Applicants need a government-issued ID, proof of income, a checking account, and a Social Security Number or ITIN.

Several features stand out at this location. Staff are bilingual in English and Spanish, making it accessible to the area's Spanish-speaking population. Both in-store and online application channels are available, and phone pre-qualification is offered so borrowers can get an estimate before visiting. The referral rewards program provides incentives for existing customers. The store maintains consistent weekday hours and is open Saturdays, though it is closed Sundays.

Honestly, Advance America is a high-cost lender. Payday loans—the company's core product—typically carry triple-digit annual percentage rates and are structured as very short-term instruments. They are intended for genuine one-time cash gaps, not recurring financial shortfalls, and repeated use can compound debt. Installment loans offer more flexibility but still carry rates far above what banks or credit unions charge. Borrowers with any access to a credit union PAL, a 0% employer advance, or a credit card cash advance should exhaust those options first. For consumers with no other access to short-term funds, Advance America is a well-rated, regulated option—but the cost of borrowing should be clearly understood before applying.
address: Eastgate Plaza, 3097 E Market St Unit 1, Logansport, IN 46947

company_info.headquarters: Eastgate Plaza, 3097 E Market St Unit 1, Logansport, IN 46947

pros: 4.9/5 rating across 125,419+ verified customer reviews and 200,000+ Google reviews
Bilingual (English and Spanish) staff at this Jacksonville location
Dual application channels — apply online or in person at the store
Title loans up to $25,000 available via LoanCenter partnership for vehicle owners
Installment loans allow repayment in multiple payments, unlike lump-sum payday loans
Western Union money transfer services available in-store
Phone pre-qualification available — borrowers can check eligibility before visiting
cons: Payday loans are 2–4 week term instruments that typically carry triple-digit APRs — expensive for any extended borrowing
Title loans require a fully paid-off vehicle with title in the borrower's name — not accessible to most
Payday and installment loan maximum is $1,000, which may be insufficient for larger emergencies
Store is closed Sundays, limiting access during weekend emergencies
No APR figures are disclosed on the store page — borrowers must ask or apply to see actual rates
best_for: Borrowers needing $100–$500 quickly before their next paycheck with no other credit options
Consumers who need up to $1,000 and prefer a multi-payment repayment schedule over a lump sum
Vehicle owners with a clear, paid-off title who need larger emergency funds up to $25,000
Spanish-speaking borrowers seeking bilingual in-person loan assistance
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers who need fast small-dollar cash and have exhausted lower-cost alternatives such as credit union loans, employer advances, or 0% credit cards. The main caveat is cost — payday loans in particular carry very high rates and should only be used for genuine one-time short-term gaps, not as a recurring cash flow solution.
services: Title Loans (up to $25,000, via LoanCenter partnership)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
